essence: Maintains parks, streets, and public spaces to keep communities clean, safe, and welcoming.

identity.title: Public Space Maintenance Operative (Street Scene Technician)
identity.summary: Carries out repairs, cleaning, landscaping, and general upkeep of public spaces including parks, streets, and communal areas.

salary.notes: Team leaders, machinery operators, and multi‑skilled technicians can exceed £35k-£40k+.

qualifications: Knowledge of grounds maintenance and minor repairs
Ability to operate small tools and outdoor equipment
Understanding of environmental and public‑realm standards

lifestyle.description: Public space maintenance operatives work outdoors maintaining parks, streets, paths, and communal areas. Tasks include litter removal, minor repairs, graffiti checks, landscaping, and reporting hazards. The role suits individuals who enjoy varied outdoor work, community impact, and keeping public spaces safe and attractive.

habits: Communicates clearly with supervisors and the public
